SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUCIA, PAUL M IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
